reasoning: Emotional axis (60%): The button reads as warm and charming — beige/tan field, gold corner flourishes, saturated teal ring, and a pink gem-like center all sit firmly in Hyrule color space. Silhouette is round and friendly; nothing grim or scary. Mood is broadly correct. Score ~7.5/10 emotionally. Technical axis (40%): 1px outlines are present on ring and border elements; the checkerboard-dithered teal ring is a competent pixel-art technique and is pixel-grid-snapped cleanly. Corner ornaments show confident 2-3-tone shading. However, the large beige interior field is essentially flat — only one tone, no subtle shadow or highlight pass — which undersells the hand-pixeled requirement. The center pink element is too small and ambiguous to read as a pause symbol at native size; it looks like a gem, not ‖. Technical score ~6/10. Weighted: 0.6×7.5 + 0.4×6 = 6.9 → 7. Marginal: passes emotional intent but needs interior shading work and a legible pause symbol before promotion.
